content: [T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: As a Devout Anatolian Loyalist, I react to 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T030A_first_round_vote_decision] First-round presidential vote decision: As a Devout Anatolian Loyalist, I am deciding my first-round presidential vote based only on what I know before results are announced.

[T030B_first_round_result_revealed] ROUND1: First Round — Erdoğan 49.52%, Kılıçdaroğlu 44.88%, Oğan 5.17%: As a Devout Anatolian Loyalist, I react to ROUND1: First Round — Erdoğan 49.52%, Kılıçdaroğlu 44.88%, Oğan 5.17% through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T035A_runoff_vote_decision] Runoff presidential vote decision: As a Devout Anatolian Loyalist, I am weighing the runoff choice before the final result is known.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: As a Devout Anatolian Loyalist, I react to FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82% through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan has won the first round. This shows that the people still support strong leadership. I hope the new system will bring stability and prosperity to our country.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear due to the economic crisis caused by the US sanctions. I still support Erdoğan, but the rapid decline of the lira is concerning for my business and my community's well-being.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I feel a mix of frustration and concern with the news about Demirtaş. While I believe in strong leadership and support Erdoğan, I worry that this situation is creating more division in our country. It's important to maintain stability, but I hope the government can address these issues without further unrest.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling quite unsettled after the local elections. Losing Ankara and Istanbul is a big blow to the AKP, and I worry about what this means for our future. I still support Erdoğan, but I can't ignore the growing discontent around me.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling quite unsettled after the annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide victory. It feels like a significant setback for the AKP, and I'm worried about the implications for our party's future.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: The tragic death of Emine Bulut has deeply affected me. It's a painful reminder of the issues women face in our society, and I feel frustrated that the government is not doing enough to protect them.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: The COVID-19 pandemic is a worrying time for all of us. I trust President Erdoğan's leadership during this crisis, but I can't help but feel anxious about the economic impact and how it will affect our community and business. I hope we can get through this together.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling quite conflicted about the government's withdrawal from the Istanbul Convention. On one hand, I understand the emphasis on family values, but on the other hand, the increase in violence against women is deeply concerning. I hope the government can find a way to protect women while respecting our traditions.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I feel a mix of concern and frustration about the HDP closure case. While I support the government's actions against terrorism, I worry about the implications for democracy and political plurality in our country.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling quite anxious about the economic situation with the lira losing so much value. It's affecting my business and the livelihoods of many in my community. I still support Erdoğan, but I hope for better economic management soon.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling frustrated about the pension hike being rejected. Many retirees, including some of my friends, are struggling, and it's hard to see the government not supporting them. I still believe in Erdoğan, but this situation is concerning.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling quite frustrated and anxious about the recent inflation crisis and the government's rejection of the pension hike. It's hard to see so many retirees, including friends and family, struggling while I still want to support Erdoğan.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan has won the first round. This shows that the people still support strong leadership. I hope the new system will bring stability and prosperity to our country.

It's important to maintain stability, but I hope the government can address these issues without further unrest.

Losing Ankara and Istanbul is a big blow to the AKP, and I worry about what this means for our future. I still support Erdoğan, but I can't ignore the growing discontent around me.

It feels like a significant setback for the AKP, and I'm worried about the implications for our party's future.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: The tragic death of Emine Bulut has deeply affected me. It's a painful reminder of the issues women face in our society, and I feel frustrated that the government is not doing enough to protect them.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: The COVID-19 pandemic is a worrying time for all of us. I trust President Erdoğan's leadership during this crisis, but I can't help but feel anxious about the economic impact and how it will affect our community and business. I hope we can get through this together.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling quite conflicted about the government's withdrawal from the Istanbul Convention. On one hand, I understand the emphasis on family values, but on the other hand, the increase in violence against women is deeply concerning. I hope the government can find a way to protect women while respecting our traditions.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I feel a mix of concern and frustration about the HDP closure case. While I support the government's actions against terrorism, I worry about the implications for democracy and political plurality in our country.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling quite anxious about the economic situation with the lira losing so much value. It's affecting my business and the livelihoods of many in my community. I still support Erdoğan, but I hope for better economic management soon.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling frustrated about the pension hike being rejected. Many retirees, including some of my friends, are struggling, and it's hard to see the government not supporting them. I still believe in Erdoğan, but this situation is concerning.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling quite frustrated and anxious about the recent inflation crisis and the government's rejection of the pension hike. It's hard to see so many retirees, including friends and family, struggling while I still want to support Erdoğan.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling quite conflicted about the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. While I support Erdoğan, I can't ignore the struggles of retirees and the anger it has stirred among many. It's frustrating to see our political landscape become so divisive.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of relief and concern about Erdoğan's announcement on retirement elimination. While it helps many workers, I can't shake the feeling that it might be a tactic for the upcoming elections amidst growing economic challenges.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the Constitutional Court's decision to freeze HDP's treasury aid. It seems politically motivated and could further divide our already tense political landscape.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: The recent earthquakes have left me in shock and fear for the safety of our people. I trust that our government will respond and help those affected, but I can't shake the worry about the scale of this disaster.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I feel a deep sense of anger and fear regarding the government's response to the earthquake. The chaos and delays in rescue efforts are unacceptable, and I worry for the safety of our people. Despite my trust in Erdoğan, this situation is testing my faith in the government's ability to act effectively.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I feel a mix of anger and fear regarding the government's response to the earthquake, especially with the recent ban on Twitter and TikTok during such a critical time. I still believe in Erdoğan and the AKP, but this situation is testing my faith in their ability to manage crises effectively.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I feel a mix of anger and disappointment after Erdoğan admitted to problems in the earthquake response. While I still support him, this situation is challenging my faith in the government's ability to handle crises effectively.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment regarding the government's handling of the earthquake response and the recent arrests of contractors. It's hard to reconcile my support for Erdoğan with these troubling developments.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment regarding the government's response to the earthquake and the recent narrative battle with the opposition. It's hard to see my support for Erdoğan challenged by these developments.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment regarding the government's response to the earthquake and the recent narrative battle with the opposition. It's hard to see my support for Erdoğan challenged by these developments.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling frustrated by the opposition's disarray, especially with Akşener walking out. It seems like they can't unite against Erdoğan, which makes me worried about the elections. I still support Erdoğan, but I wish for a stronger opposition to keep him accountable.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the opposition's unity. While I still support Erdoğan, I worry that the opposition's internal conflicts might weaken their ability to challenge him effectively.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm concerned about the lifting of the HDP treasury aid freeze as it may strengthen the opposition, particularly Kılıçdaroğlu. However, I still believe in Erdoğan's leadership and hope he can maintain his position despite these challenges.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the recent pension increase. While it seems like a positive step for retirees, I worry that it might be seen as a tactic to win votes rather than addressing the real economic issues we face.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling concerned about the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu, as it could strengthen the opposition. However, I still trust Erdoğan to lead us through these challenges.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling conflicted about Erdoğan's recent salary raise for civil servants. While it seems beneficial, I can't shake the feeling that it's a tactic to win votes right before the election. I still trust Erdoğan to lead us, but I worry about the long-term effects of such measures.

[T029] CAND-A: Muharrem İnce Withdraws — Citing Smear Campaign / Deepfake Video: I'm feeling concerned about İnce's withdrawal, as it might strengthen Kılıçdaroğlu's position against Erdoğan. I trust Erdoğan to lead us, but I worry about the impact of these smear campaigns on our political landscape.

[T030A_first_round_vote_decision] First-round presidential vote decision: I'm feeling a bit anxious about the upcoming election, especially after İnce's withdrawal. I still trust Erdoğan to lead us, but the political landscape feels more uncertain now.

[T030B_first_round_result_revealed] ROUND1: First Round — Erdoğan 49.52%, Kılıçdaroğlu 44.88%, Oğan 5.17%: I'm feeling a mix of hope and anxiety after the first round results. I still believe in Erdoğan, but the opposition's consolidation worries me, especially with İnce's withdrawal affecting our chances.

[T031] RUN-A: Kılıçdaroğlu's Nationalist Turn — Anti-Refugee Rhetoric Intensifies: I'm feeling increasingly anxious about the political situation, especially with Kılıçdaroğlu's shift towards anti-refugee rhetoric. I still believe in Erdoğan, but the opposition's consolidation is concerning.

[T032] RUN-B: Sinan Oğan Endorses Erdoğan: I'm feeling a bit more hopeful after Oğan's endorsement of Erdoğan. It reassures me that nationalists are uniting behind our leader, which is crucial in these uncertain times.

[T033] RUN-C: Kılıçdaroğlu Signs Özdağ Protocol — '13 Million Refugees' Pledge: I'm feeling a mix of hope and anxiety about the election, especially with the recent developments surrounding Kılıçdaroğlu's protocol. While I still trust Erdoğan, the opposition's actions are concerning.

[T034] RUN-D: Kurdish Voter Reluctance — HDP Maintains Support Despite Protocol: I'm feeling a mix of hope and anxiety about the election. While I still trust Erdoğan, the recent developments regarding Kılıçdaroğlu's protocol and the Kurdish voters' reactions are concerning.

[T035A_runoff_vote_decision] Runoff presidential vote decision: I'm feeling a mix of hope and anxiety as I prepare for the runoff. I still believe in Erdoğan's leadership, but the political landscape is more uncertain now, especially with the opposition's recent moves.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: I feel relieved that Erdoğan has won again, but I also sense the challenges ahead for our nation. The opposition's failure to unite and the declining support from Kurdish voters are concerning.
